parameters.filterByFormula: ={{ 'AND({Phase Number}=' + $('Code \u2014 Validate Project').first().json.stageInfo.start + ',{Asset Type}="image",FIND("' + $('Code \u2014 Validate Project').first().json.projectName + '",ARRAYJOIN({Project})))' }}

={{ 'AND({Phase Number}=' + $('Code \u2014 Validate Project').first().json.stageInfo.ref + ',{Asset Type}="image",FIND("' + $('Code \u2014 Validate Project').first().json.projectName + '",ARRAYJOIN({Project})))' }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'nano-banana-pro', callBackUrl: $('Code \u2014 Validate & Build Job').first().json.callbackUrl, input: { prompt: $('Code \u2014 Validate & Build Job').first().json.editPromptText, image_input: [$('Code \u2014 Validate & Build Job').first().json.referenceImageDriveUrl], aspect_ratio: '9:16', resolution: '2K', output_format: 'png' } }) }}
